message.eating_not_balanced: I can't eat the same thing twice!
gamerule.renourisheddelight:playerStarti: Defines how many hearts a player starts with when first joining the world or respawning.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:maxConsumabl: Maximum number of different foods a player can have active at the same time.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:allowEatingT: Whether players are allowed to consume multiple of the same food item.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:replaceLowes: Whether eating food will replace the lowest level food item.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:foodReplenis: At what point as a % can the player start eating again to replenish a food's level.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:foodItemStac: Whether same eaten food items tick down simultaneously.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:hungerFoodDr: Defines how much hunger effects food exhaustion.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:regenHealthT: Number of ticks between natural health regeneration.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:regenHealthF: How food is drained every time health regen occurs.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:applyNourish: Whether to apply the Nourishment effect when the hunger bar is full.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:regenDelayAf: Number of ticks to wait after taking damage before natural health regeneration can resume.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:sleepFoodDra: Duration in ticks of how much food is drained when sleeping through the night.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:attackFoodDr: Extra ticks of food drained every time a player attacks.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:jumpFoodDrai: Extra ticks of food drained every time a player jumps.
gamerule.renourisheddelight:sprintFoodDr: Extra ticks of food drained per tick while a player is sprinting.
config.renourisheddelight.title: Renourished Delight
text.autoconfig.renourisheddelight/clien: Horizontal pixel offset for the food display UI.
Vertical pixel offset for the food display UI.
Item ID to sample for the golden-effect color palette.
Whether to render the active food items panel next to the inventory screen.
Cache generated item icon atlases to disk, so resource reloads skip re-rendering every icon when nothing changed.
text.autoconfig.renourisheddelight/commo: Multiplier applied to every attribute bonus amount granted by food.
Multiplier applied to how long food effects last.
Percentage of the smallest active food's duration granted as Nourishment when eating while full.
Multiplier applied to the natural regen tick interval computed from food quality.
